title: Department Manager Vacancy at Reliance Digital - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Reliance Digital - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, Reliance Digital in Jodhpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Reliance Digital:
Reliance Digital is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Digital!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
